name: spt-ai
description: Sponge-Theory.ai content admin by Sponge Theory — create and manage blog posts, products, external-SaaS entries, tiers, digital products, media and site config on your Sponge-Theory.ai site, directly from Claude Code, via your site's MCP endpoint.

base_url.title: Sponge-Theory.ai API base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Sponge-Theory.ai backend, without /mcp — e.g. https://apisaas.sponge-theory.ai

api_key.title: Service API key (spt_…)
api_key.description: A service API key, created in your site admin under Settings → API keys. Shown once at creation.
